Room.title: Room
Room.description: A chat room created by a user with a specific code.

code.description: The unique code used to join the room.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who created the room.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A message sent within a chat room.

senderId.description: The UID of the user who sent the message.

senderName.description: The display name of the sender.

senderPhoto.description: The profile photo URL of the sender.

rooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection of messages within a specific chat room.
